content.query:
CREATE TABLE bank_schema.customerdata(
    custid INT,
    fname varchar(100),
    lname varchar(100),
    age int,
    prof varchar(100)
)
WITH
(
     CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX,
     DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN
);


COPY INTO bank_schema.customerdata
FROM 'https://batch25synapseadls.dfs.core.windows.net/raw/custdata.csv'
WITH(
    FILE_TYPE = 'CSV',
    FIRSTROW = 2
);

select * from bank_schema.customerdata;


Create table bank_schema.bank_txns_adls
(
    txnid varchar(20),
    txndate date,
    custid varchar(20),
    amt float,
    branch varchar(50),
    region varchar(50)
)
WITH
(
    CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX,  --large amount of data, compress and best of performance
    DISTRIBUTION = HASH(region)  -- distributes data evenly across all nodes
);

--reading data from external storage account

COPY INTO bank_schema.bank_txns_adls
FROM 'https://inceptezadlsbankdata.dfs.core.windows.net/bankdata/bank_txns.csv'
WITH(
    FILE_TYPE = 'CSV',
    FIRSTROW = 2,
    CREDENTIAL = (IDENTITY = 'Managed Identity')

);

select * from bank_schema.bank_txns_adls;
